_comment: Goody-hut (discovery-site) reward table (§9). The first land unit to enter a hut consumes it and rolls one reward weighted by `weight`. A difficulty may override a goody's weight via difficulties.json `goody_weights` (id -> weight). Effect verbs are read by Events.exploration_reward: treasury (min..max gold), experience (min..max XP to the unit), heal (unit to full health), map (signal-only reveal of `radius` tiles, no sim state), unit (spawn `unit_type` for the discoverer), tech (grant a free researchable tech), ambush (the discoverer takes `damage`% and a hostile may be implied). Magnitudes live here so the table is the single source of reward tuning.
